series_metadata.series_description: Resolutions are sent to us by county commissioners or transit authorities to enact increases or decreases in sales/use tax. Some have to be voted on, some can be imposed by the county commissioners. The resolutions are based on the ORC sales-5739.021, 5739.023, 5739.026 and use-5741.021, 5741.022 and 574.023

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 30 years, or 6 months after scanning. ; Electronic: Retain 30 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
